title: Human Kidney, Urinary Tract, and Lung Cell Type Mapping  Pipeline for the Human Biomolecular Atlas Program (HuBMAP)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dhjdr","text":"This document provides an overview of the protocols used by the Human Kidney, Urinary Tract, and Lung Mapping Center (KULMAP) for generation of spatially resolved mulitomic cell type organ maps within HuBMAP. This involves sequencing of the transcriptomes and epigenomes of dissociated single cells in a massively parallel manner, which will then inform on a highly multiplexed RNA in situ imaging method (DART-FISH) for spatial mapping of hundreds of molecular targets in the tissue sections, at a subcellular resolution. These spatial molecular maps will serve as scaffolds for computational registration of cell types and the associated transcriptome/chromatin maps to the tissue space. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":382,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"25gdj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"tfgm","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Collection and processing of human tissues. Bladder, Ureter, Kidney: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.568g9hw Lung airways and parenchyma: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bjuxknxn and dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bjtnknme
Isolation of single nuclei for omic assays. Bladder, Ureter, Kidney: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ufketkw Lung airways and parenchyma: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bh26j8he

Running of multimodal single cell/nucleus assays. 10X snRNA-seq: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.86khzcw 10X snATAC-seq: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bvssn6ee SNARE-Seq2: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.be5gjg3w
Spatial in situ mapping of multiomic profiles. DART-FISH: Protocols coming soon.
creator: Blue Lake
